---
title: "ENCASE - EnhaNcing seCurity and privacy in the Social wEb: a user centered approach for the protection of minors"
sort_year: 2019
year: "2019"
status: "Past"
funder: "H2020-MSCA-RISE-2015"
categories: [Media & Social Media Monitoring, Past]
---

**Year:** 2019
**Status:** Past
**Funder:** H2020-MSCA-RISE-2015
**Research Cluster:** Media & Social Media Monitoring
